name: Kearny Financial Corp.
business: Kearny Financial Corp. is the holding company for Kearny Bank, a New Jersey-chartered savings bank. The bank attracts deposits from the general public and originates loans, primarily commercial and residential real estate loans, for its portfolio and for sale into the secondary market. It operates 43 branch offices in New Jersey and New York.
sellsTo: individuals and businesses in New Jersey and New York

exposures.sentence: Our cloud-based, best-in-class digital banking and online account opening platform has become a cornerstone of our omnichannel strategy, delivering seamless and secure experiences across all client touchpoints.

The financial services industry has experienced an increase in both the number and severity of reported cyber-attacks aimed at gaining unauthorized access to bank systems as a way to misappropriate assets and sensitive information, corrupt and destroy data, or cause operational disruptions.

We have made and expect to continue to make investments to integrate artificial intelligence tools into our solutions, including generative artificial intelligence, machine learning, and similar tools and technologies that collect, aggregate, analyze or generate data or other contents (collectively, AI ), and we expect to continue to adopt such tools responsibly and as appropriate.
At June 30, 2025, multi-family mortgage loans totaled $2.71 billion, or 46.6% of our loan portfolio, while nonresidential mortgage loans totaled $986.6 million, or 17.0% of our loan portfolio.
